case_title: YETIVE EDMONDS VS. CABLECOM, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDMONDS, YETIVE BY HER CONSERVATOR THOMAS A LUCAS AS TO DEFENDANT CABLECOM DOES 1 TO 6 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-06-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-21-2012
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-06-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-15-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-25-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-15-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-25-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-25-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-27-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR STIP AND /OR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDMONDS, YETIVE BY HER CONSERVATOR THOMAS A LUCAS
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDMONDS, YETIVE BY HER CONSERVATOR THOMAS A LUCAS
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-27-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT PER ORDER (COPY OF ORDER IN DEPT. 301 OUTBOX) DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS CABLECOM, INC. TO BE CABLECOM

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) CABLECOM. THE JAN-15-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDMONDS, YETIVE BY HER CONSERVATOR THOMAS A LUCAS SERVED DEC-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CABLECOM
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CABLECOM

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-17-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE MAR-19-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CABLECOM JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 10.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-13-2013. APR-17-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-23-2013.
ARBITRATOR CHRIS ARTHUR TARKINGTON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAY-24-2013 THROUGH AUG-22-2013.
STIP TO CONT JUDICIAL ARB HRG; DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CABLECOM
ORDER EXTENDING THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION TO SEP-23-2013
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO SEP-23-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SECOND JOINT STIP AND ORDER TO EXTEND ARB'S JURISDICTION PERIOD; DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CABLECOM
ORDER EXTENDING THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION TO JAN-23-2014
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO JAN-23-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
THIRD JOINT STIP AND ORDER TO EXTEND ARB'S JURISDICTION PERIOD AND DEADLINE TO FILE ARBITRATION AWARD; DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CABLECOM
ORDER EXTENDING ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTIONAL PERIOD
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO APR-23-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
FOURTH JOINT STIPULATION TO EXTEND ARBITRATORS JURISDICTIONAL PERIOD AND DEADLINE TO FILE ARBITRATION AWARD PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 4.1 SECTION G; FILED BY DEFENDANT CABLECOM

DECLARATION OF JUDY LIAO IN SUPPORT OF FOURTH JOINT STIPULATION TO EXTEND ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTIONAL PERIOD AND DEADLINE TO FILE ARBITRATION AWARD FROM APRIL 23, 2014 TO AUGUST 21, 2014 FILED BY DEFENDANT CABLECOM
ORDER GRANTING EXTENSION OF ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION TO AUG-21-2014
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO AUG-21-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF MAY-02-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
